pr.title: Record: 5-expert Hedge Mixer + TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0745)

output.summary: Online 5-expert Hedge context mixer blends neural logits with n-gram stats during sliding-window TTT eval while keeping GPTQ calibration inside the 600s budget.
techniques: GPU-vectorized Hedge mixing of neural and n-gram experts
Score-first TTT with chunked sliding-window evaluation
GPTQ int5 calibration within the 600s training run
